ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the stock prices were recorded */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company (e.g., SNE, AMD, TWTR, IBM, MU) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_companies" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company included in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the company was added to the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the company was added to the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company for which the alert is set */,
  "price_threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert (e.g., 50.0) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price alert that triggered the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message sent to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES price_alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, portfolio update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time of the system */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* Average CPU usage of the system */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage of the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the article is related to */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the post is related to */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the post is related to */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
